gameTitle: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

achievements.title: Cheering Charm Inventor
achievements.description: Find the Felix Summerbee Wizard card by feeding the puffskein
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Serial Goblin Killer
achievements.description: Find the Yardley Platt Wizard card by earning 800 points de-gnoming the Burrow
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Hogsmeade Founder
achievements.description: Find the Hengist of Woodcroft Wizard card in the forest near the Burrow
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: But What Did You Forget?
achievements.description: Get the Remembrall by getting Ginny's puffskein to spit it out
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Beans in the Burrow
achievements.description: Collect all of the beans in the Burrow and the Floo slide
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Society Founder
achievements.description: Find the Dorcas Wellbeloved Wizard card in the Hogwarts Express tunnels
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Whomping Willow Trouncer
achievements.description: Defeat the Whomping Willow
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Perfect Whomping Willow Trouncer
achievements.description: Defeat the Whomping Willow without taking damage
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Self-Stirring Cauldron Inventor
achievements.description: Find the Gaspard Shingleton Wizard card in a special secret area in Hogwarts
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Bean Inventor
achievements.description: Find the Bertie Bott Wizard card in a secret area in Eastern Hall
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: The Boy Who Lived
achievements.description: Find the Harry Potter Wizard card in a secret area in the library
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Floo Powder Inventor
achievements.description: Pay 50 beans for the Ignatia Wildsmith Wizard card
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Author of "Charm Your Own Cheese"
achievements.description: Pay 50 beans for the Greta Catchlove Wizard card
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Dragon Pox Victim
achievements.description: Pay 50 beans for the Chauncey Oldridge Wizard card
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Basilisk Breeder
achievements.description: Pay 50 beans for the Herpo the Foul Wizard card
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Greatest of Alchemists
achievements.description: Pay 50 beans for the Paracelsus Wizard card
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Parkour on the Clock
achievements.description: Win the Herbology Race Cup by getting to class in less than 50 seconds
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Excellent Casting
achievements.description: Win the Herbology Lesson Cup by getting an 'A' grade in Herbology
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Adventurous Flyer
achievements.description: Find the Jocunda Sykes Wizard card in a secret area in the Upper Castle
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Celebrated Seer
achievements.description: Find the Cassandra Vablatsky card in a secret area in the Knights' Room
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Magical Theoretician
achievements.description: Find the Adalbart Waffling Wizard card in a secret area in the Gallery
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Fastest Wizard in the West
achievements.description: Win the Defense Against the Dark Arts Race Cup by getting to class in less than 1 minute 24 seconds
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Very Stylish! Just Like Me!
achievements.description: Win the Defense Against the Dark Arts Lesson Cup by getting an 'A' grade in the first Defense Against the Dark Arts class
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Brave Founder
achievements.description: Find the Godric Gryffindor Wizard card by winning all four of the Race and Lesson Cups
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Poltergeist Defeater
achievements.description: Defeat Peeves
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Perfect Poltergeist Defeater
achievements.description: Defeat Peeves without taking damage
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Sneakoscope Inventor
achievements.description: Find the Edgar Stroulger Wizard card by earning 800 points de-gnoming the pumpkin patch
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Beans in the Dungeons
achievements.description: Collect all of the beans in all areas of the Dungeons and the Slytherin Chase
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Sharpshooter
achievements.description: Survive Myrtle's item throwing without taking damage
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Illegal Sphinx Keeper
achievements.description: Find the Crispin Cronk Wizard card by getting an 'A' grade in the second Defense Against the Dark Arts class
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Headmaster of Hogwarts
achievements.description: Find the Albus Dumbledore Wizard card in a secret area in the Forbidden Forest
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Beans on the Castle Grounds
achievements.description: Collect all of the beans in all areas of the Castle Grounds and the Forbidden Forest
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Spider Squisher
achievements.description: Defeat Aragog
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Perfect Spider Squisher
achievements.description: Defeat Aragog without taking damage
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Wizard Chess Champion
achievements.description: Find the Montague Knightley Wizard card in a secret area near the Gryffindor common room
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Landlady of the Leaky Cauldron
achievements.description: Find the Daisy Dodderidge Wizard card in a secret area near Lockhart's office
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Hard-Working Founder
achievements.description: Find the Helga Hufflepuff Wizard card by defeating the Hufflepuff Wizard dueling champion
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Intelligent Founder
achievements.description: Find the Rowena Ravenclaw Wizard card by defeating the Ravenclaw Wizard dueling champion

achievements.title: Cunning Founder
achievements.description: Find the Salazar Slytherin Wizard card by defeating the Slytherin Wizard dueling champion

achievements.title: Hey! It's Me!
achievements.description: See the sketchbook after finding all 24 Wizard cards and finding a secret room
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.title: Out Of Bounds
achievements.description: Increase your attack power by having at least 500 beans and finding a secret room in the Front Hall

achievements.title: Beans in the Upper Castle
achievements.description: Collect all of the beans in all areas of the Upper Castle

achievements.title: Beans in the Lower Castle
achievements.description: Collect all of the beans in all areas of the Lower Castle
achievements.author: Alfex

achievements.description: Eat all of the chocolate frogs and drink all of the Wiggenweld Potions in the game

achievements.description: Defeat the Basilisk

achievements.title: Perfect Basilisk Vanquisher
achievements.description: Defeat the Basilisk without taking damage
